limitations: FOI-O NZ aggregate reports are not official PSC reporting.
Values are public FYI-derived indicators from the supplied event stream only.
Partial, agency-internal-required, and not-derivable metrics must not be used as official performance statistics.

exclusions: Agency-internal case-management records not present in public source data.
metrics.name: Public FYI request records observed
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Counts only records present in the public FYI-derived corpus.
Does not represent whole-agency OIA workload.
warnings: public_fyi_indicator_only: count is limited to the supplied public event stream

exclusions: Agency completions not represented by observable correspondence.
metrics.name: Completed OIA requests
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Public FYI records can identify many public-platform completions but not all agency OIA requests.
Some closures, withdrawals, or administrative completions may not be visible publicly.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records

exclusions: Informal pauses or agency-internal validity decisions not observable in public records.
metrics.name: Responses within legislative timeframe
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Requires reliable received date, decision date, extensions, and working-day calendar.
Public dates may differ from agency receipt and decision timestamps.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records
metric_value_not_calculated: matching public events are counted only as context

exclusions: Extensions notified outside the public correspondence thread.
metrics.name: Extensions notified
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Extension notices may be extractable from correspondence.
Absence of public extension text is not evidence that no extension occurred.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records

exclusions: Internal routing that does not produce public transfer correspondence.
metrics.name: Transfers
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Needs correspondence evidence and a distinction between full and partial transfer.
Agency-internal transfer records may not appear in public correspondence.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records

exclusions: Partial releases where refusal grounds are not machine-observable.
Informal withdrawals or no-information-held outcomes unless explicitly extracted.
metrics.name: Refusals
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Needs decision-letter evidence and statutory-basis extraction.
Public FYI state labels alone are insufficient to classify refusal categories.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records

exclusions: Agency disclosure-log records not linked to the FYI request corpus.
metrics.name: Published responses
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: FYI responses are already public, but agency disclosure-log publication is a separate event.
Public FYI source data cannot prove agency publication policy compliance.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records

exclusions: Agency-internal paused periods or validity determinations not visible in public correspondence.
metrics.name: Average time to respond
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Requires reliable agency receipt and response timestamps.
Public FYI timestamps may not match agency case-management timestamps.
Working-day calculations are indicative unless matched to authoritative calendars and extension records.
warnings: partial_indicator_not_official_report: public data may omit agency-internal records
metric_value_not_calculated: matching public events are counted only as context

exclusions: Complaints not publicly mentioned in the FYI thread.
Ombudsman outcomes unavailable in the public corpus.
metrics.name: Ombudsman complaints
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: FYI may show requester comments about complaints.
Official complaint status comes from Ombudsman or agency reporting.

exclusions: Any inferred demographic or organisational classification from public names or correspondence.
metrics.name: Requester category breakdown
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Public FYI data does not reliably expose official requester category fields.
Inferring requester category from names or text would be unsafe and outside scope.

exclusions: Any modelled cost, staff-time estimate, or productivity inference from public text alone.
metrics.name: Processing costs and staff time
metrics.official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
public_data_limitations: Public FYI correspondence does not expose agency staff time or internal cost accounting.
Estimating cost from response length or elapsed time would be speculative.

source_profile: New Zealand Public Service Commission OIA statistics
